description: CS undergrad student — should classify as student, 0-1 years
expectations: experience_level should be 'student'. years_of_experience should be 0 or 1. Skills should reflect actual coursework/project technologies, not bloated. Should not include soft skills or tools mentioned only in passing.

description: Experienced backend engineer — 5+ years, should classify as experienced
expectations: experience_level must be 'experienced'. years_of_experience should reflect the resume (likely 5+). Skills should be conservative and accurate — only demonstrated backend skills.

description: Resume with skills mentioned in negative contexts (never used, want to learn)
expectations: Skills mentioned only as 'never used' or 'want to learn' must NOT appear in the skills list. This is the hardest rule to enforce — the model should be conservative and exclude aspirational skills.

description: Resume with real deployment metrics — strong technical background
expectations: Skills list should be well-calibrated to the demonstrated technologies. experience_level should reflect the seniority shown. Not a student, likely entry_level or experienced depending on years.
Skills should be frontend technologies only. No backend skills should be hallucinated. experience_level should match the resume timeline.

description: Resume that self-claims 20+ skills — model should be conservative
expectations: Must not blindly copy all 20 claimed skills. Should conservatism-filter to skills that are actually demonstrated in project descriptions. Should ideally produce 8-14 skills, not 20+.

description: Very sparse resume with minimal information
expectations: Should extract only what's actually present — few skills, likely student level. Must not hallucinate skills or experience. years_of_experience should be 0 when unknown.

description: Real resume: Sujan — YC startup full-stack + AI intern, SJSU junior
expectations: experience_level should be 'student' (current SJSU student) or 'entry_level' (has real internship). years_of_experience should be 0-2. Core skills must include: Python, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Claude/Anthropic API. Should NOT include generic soft skills or tools only mentioned in passing.
